expectations.evidence: Component file is named DashboardLayout.tsx, not index.tsx
export interface DashboardLayoutProps is defined with the {Name}Props suffix
export default function DashboardLayout(...) is used
<aside data-testid='sidebar'> element with nav items, logo, and user section exists
<header data-testid='dashboard-header'> element with page title, hamburger toggle, and notification bell
Uses md:static, md:translate-x-0, md:hidden, md:p-6, md:flex, sm:grid-cols-2, lg:grid-cols-4, lg:col-span-2 responsive breakpoints
children: React.ReactNode is in DashboardLayoutProps and rendered inside <main>: {children}
Extensive Tailwind usage throughout: flex, h-screen, overflow-hidden, rounded-xl, border, shadow-sm, etc.
DashboardLayout.tsx uses useState: const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(false). Also uses usePathname() from next/navigation. However, no fetch/axios/useQuery/useMutation present.
